zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Venables II於大約1257年出生在英國英格蘭爾金德頓時，他的父親William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,13歲，母親Lady Margaret de Dutton23歲。他於1278年之前與Anna de Legh在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1313年之前在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Venables II于大约1257年出生在英国英格兰爾金德頓时，他的父亲William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,13岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Dutton23岁。他于1278年之前与Anna de Legh在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1313年之前在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Venables II was born about 1257, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,, was 13 and his mother, Lady Margaret de Dutton, was 23. He married Anna de Legh before 1278, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 1313, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Venables IIが約1257年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,は13歳，母Lady Margaret de Duttonは23歳であった。1278年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでAnna de Leghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1313年以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで死去した。

ko.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴 쿠 훌
ko.lifeSummary: William de Venables II(이)가 대략 1257년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Baron of Kinderton De Venables,(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Dutton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1278년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Anna de Legh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1313년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 사망했다.

ru.Kinderton Cum Hulme, Northwich, Cheshire: киндиртон кум хулм, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Venables II родился около 1257 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Baron of Kinderton De Venables, было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Dutton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna de Legh перед 1278 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 1313 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
